requirement_compliance.title: Project registration via interactive setup
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-001h/e/f passing (3/3). Interactive TTY-only setup is by design for v1 — ≤5 prompts constraint implies human interaction. Non-interactive mode is out of scope.

requirement_compliance.title: Read and parse .aitri state file per project
Dashboard — aitri-hub web (web-only, CLI monitor removed)
requirement_compliance.evidence: CLI terminal monitor intentionally removed (commit 2ea9607). aitri-hub monitor redirects to aitri-hub web by design — web dashboard is the single surface. TC-005h/e/f passing (3/3 stub tests). No debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Web dashboard — React served via Node.js at localhost:3000
requirement_compliance.evidence: Docker dropped as overkill — lib/commands/web.js uses Node.js built-in http server. Dashboard served at localhost:3000 via aitri-hub web. TC-006h/e/f passing (3/3). Auto-refreshes every 5s. No debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Remote project support (GitHub/GitLab URLs)
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-008h/e/f passing (3/3). Clone, pull, and unreachable-remote failure paths verified. No declared debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Consolidated dashboard data file
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-009h/e passing (2/3; 1 skipped — no marker). Integration roundtrip and atomic write verified. No declared debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Collection cycle ≤5s for 20 local projects
requirement_compliance.evidence: collectAll() uses Promise.all for parallel collection. TC-NFR010 confirms 10-feature scan in <5s. Architecture validated for 20-project scale.

requirement_compliance.title: Single unreadable project must not crash
requirement_compliance.evidence: collectOne() returns status='unreadable' rather than throwing. TC-008f verifies non-throw for unreachable remote. TC-NFR011 verifies malformed feature .aitri does not affect others.

requirement_compliance.title: Setup completable without prior knowledge
requirement_compliance.evidence: Setup flow uses ≤5 prompts with inline guidance. TTY-interactive by design for v1.

requirement_compliance.title: Works on macOS, Linux, and Windows WSL2 with Node.js 18+
requirement_compliance.evidence: Zero runtime dependencies — only Node.js built-ins. No Docker dependency. Portable by construction.

requirement_compliance.title: No project data transmitted outside local machine
requirement_compliance.evidence: Architecture uses local file I/O only. Remote projects use user-registered git clone/pull. Node.js http server is localhost-only. No external API calls.
